checks.expectation: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to the module's page route (e.g., /featured-resources) -- verify the themed template renders visible output (not raw HTML, not PHP errors, not a blank page) (via eval-browser)
checks.evidence: Successfully authenticated via drush uli. Navigated to /featured-resources. Page title: 'Featured Resources | Drush Site-Install'. HTML validation: page has valid <main> element, contains no error/exception/fatal/parse error messages. HTTP 200 response. Body class includes 'featured-resources' path class. Template rendered with Olivero theme assets (CSS, fonts, toolbar). No raw HTML leakage or PHP errors detected.
